title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.130 - Benefits granted may be reconsidered
text:
208.130.  Benefits granted may be reconsidered. — All benefits granted may be reconsidered by the director of the department of social services or the appropriate division as frequently as he or she may deem necessary.  After such further investigation the amount of a benefit may be changed or entirely withdrawn.
(RSMo 1939 § 9412, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
